steps.title: Center the location detail
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that emphasizes the location of the Haystack Mountain School of Crafts. The relevant note says the building complex is located in Deer Isle, Maine.

steps.title: Reject shifted emphasis
steps.content: Choice B emphasizes architecture and building features while omitting the location. Choice C includes Deer Isle, Maine, but its main focus is the architect. Choice D focuses on Nolan Avery and cedar-shingled buildings. The sentence about traveling to Deer Isle, Maine makes location central. The answer is A.
